'''Na-Jia''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|human]] living as a thief on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Diado]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. After stealing [[Saesee Tiin/Legends|Saesee Tiin's]] [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]], he paid her for its return. She was later captured by [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederate]] forces, who believed her to be a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] spy along with Tiin. She helped him recover his lightsaber from them, and the two managed to escape.

==Behind the scenes==
Na-Jia first appeared in the short story ''[[It Takes a Thief]]'', which was one of four stories in the [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 6|sixth volume]] of the [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures (graphic novels)|''Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures'']] [[Star Wars comic books|trade paperbacks]]. She was created and penciled by [[Matthew Fillbach|Matthew]] and [[Shawn Fillbach]]. Na-Jia garnered an entry in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''.
